decisions.title: Commit to Canvas Template Components Migration (ENG-10073)
decisions.context: Canvas needs architectural cleanup to scale. Template components enable faster iteration and better maintainability, directly supporting 'Nail the Core' pillar. Version improvements (ENG-9441) depend on solid foundation.

arguments.for: Enables faster Canvas feature velocity; reduces technical debt; supports version improvements roadmap; aligns with Nail the Core
arguments.against: Migration effort may slow new feature delivery short-term; requires careful backwards compatibility handling

decisions.title: Prioritize Client-Side Parsing (TDMS/HDF5) for Embed Deeper Strategy
decisions.context: ENG-9980 (TDMS) and ENG-9968 (HDF5) client-side parsing with ENG-10268 support enables customers to self-serve data ingestion. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' pillar - reduces friction, increases Decisions Captured Per Customer.

arguments.for: Unlocks self-service for aerospace customers; reduces onboarding time; directly increases North Star metric; differentiator vs competitors
arguments.against: Browser performance constraints; may need fallback server-side parsing for large files

decisions.title: Address Calculated Channel Caching Issues Before Feature Expansion
decisions.context: ENG-9807 (stale cache after edit) and ENG-9703 (contextual channels overwritten) indicate core reliability gaps. Must fix before promoting calculated channels more broadly - trust issue that impacts 'Nail the Core'.
decisions.blockedBy: Need to complete ROM spec (ENG-9238) to determine if caching architecture needs fundamental redesign

arguments.for: Data correctness is non-negotiable; current bugs erode user trust; blocks increased adoption of calc channels
arguments.against: ROM redesign might make current fixes throwaway work; tight timeline pressure

decisions.title: Invest in Rules Engine Scalability (Bucketing & Python Rules)
decisions.context: ENG-10272 (bucketing for evaluation) needed for Rules to scale. Python Rules is 2026 strategic product. Rules = automated decisions = core North Star driver. Need infrastructure before feature push.

arguments.for: Rules directly capture decisions; Python Rules unlocks power users; bucketing prevents performance degradation at scale; moat-building
arguments.against: Significant engineering investment; Python rules increase support complexity; security/sandboxing concerns

decisions.title: GovCloud Deployment: Proceed with Windmill for DS Workflows
decisions.context: ENG-9939 deploys Windmill in GovCloud. FIPS compliance work (ENG-9846 SHA-256) underway. Gov customers = high-value, high-compliance segment. Supports 'Build the Moat' with compliance capabilities competitors lack.

arguments.for: Unlocks government/defense market segment; demonstrates compliance commitment; Windmill enables DS self-service; competitive differentiator
arguments.against: GovCloud ops complexity; ongoing compliance maintenance burden; resource diversion from commercial features

decisions.title: Resolve Performance Degradations Before SmallSat EU Event
decisions.context: ENG-10273 (channel list loads all metadata), ENG-10233 (slow flush), ENG-10282 (data_layer_v2 investigation) indicate performance issues. GTM-113 SmallSat EU event upcoming - need polished demo experience.
decisions.blockedBy: Data layer investigation (ENG-10282) may reveal deeper architectural issues requiring more time

arguments.for: Event demos drive pipeline; performance directly impacts user perception; quick wins possible on metadata loading
arguments.against: May be symptoms of deeper issues; rushed fixes could introduce regressions; tight timeline to event

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load (80% calendar) limiting execution bandwidth. 3 critical engineering decisions pending owner assignment. Performance issues surfacing across channels, canvas, rules - suggest need for focused architecture sprint.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today - insufficient for deep technical decisions pending
22 meetings this week exceeds healthy threshold (recommend <15 for IC time)
3 performance-related issues (ENG-10273, ENG-10233, ENG-10282) suggest systemic problem requiring dedicated time
GovCloud compliance work (ENG-9939, ENG-9846) needs dedicated owner - currently unclear
SmallSat EU event (GTM-113) in ~2 weeks but performance issues unresolved
